MOTION TO DISMISS
Off Calendar Nov-15-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT DOLORES MUNOZ' MOTION TO DISMISS.

Delores Beltran's unopposed "motion dismiss [sic] action with prejudice" is granted.

Prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/RBU)

Motion To Set Aside And Vacate Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-28-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF's MIDLAND FUNDING LLC'S unopposed Motion To Set Aside And Vacate Judgment is granted.

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
